limitations: ai_investment_intensity: No dollar amounts or quantified AI-specific capex disclosed in excerpts; the 5.4% load growth figure is a PJM projection for the broader zone, not a Dominion AI-specific spend figure; score reflects named infrastructure commitment without quantified scale

ai_narrative_concreteness: AI is discussed only as an external demand driver (data center load growth), not as an internal capability or initiative Dominion is deploying; aspirational/forward-looking framing dominates

ai_risk_disclosure_depth: Risk-section material (mdna) is present; AI risks are named with specific mechanisms (cyber attack sophistication, grid reliability, franchise erosion from demand growth) tied to operational/financial impact, supporting score 4; no quantified risk treatment or named oversight body found in excerpts
